properties.name: management.endpoint.liquibase.access
properties.description: Permitted level of access for the liquibase endpoint.

properties.name: management.endpoint.liquibase.cache.time-to-live
properties.description: Maximum time that a response can be cached.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.analytics-enabled
properties.description: Whether to send product usage data and analytics to Liquibase.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.change-log
properties.description: Change log configuration path.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.clear-checksums
properties.description: Whether to clear all checksums in the current changelog, so they will be recalculated upon the next update.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.contexts
properties.description: List of runtime contexts to use.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.database-change-log-lock-table
properties.description: Name of table to use for tracking concurrent Liquibase usage.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.database-change-log-table
properties.description: Name of table to use for tracking change history.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.default-schema
properties.description: Default database schema.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.driver-class-name
properties.description: Fully qualified name of the JDBC driver. Auto-detected based on the URL by default.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.drop-first
properties.description: Whether to first drop the database schema.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable Liquibase support.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.label-filter
properties.description: List of runtime labels to use.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.license-key
properties.description: Liquibase Pro license key.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.liquibase-schema
properties.description: Schema to use for Liquibase objects.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.liquibase-tablespace
properties.description: Tablespace to use for Liquibase objects.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.parameters
properties.description: Change log parameters.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.password
properties.description: Login password of the database to migrate.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.rollback-file
properties.description: File to which rollback SQL is written when an update is performed.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.show-summary
properties.description: Whether to print a summary of the update operation.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.show-summary-output
properties.description: Where to print a summary of the update operation.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.tag
properties.description: Tag name to use when applying database changes. Can also be used with "rollbackFile" to generate a rollback script for all existing changes associated with that tag.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.test-rollback-on-update
properties.description: Whether rollback should be tested before update is performed.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.ui-service
properties.description: Which UIService to use.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.url
properties.description: JDBC URL of the database to migrate. If not set, the primary configured data source is used.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.user
properties.description: Login user of the database to migrate.

properties.name: spring.liquibase.check-change-log-location
properties.description: Check the change log location exists.

deprecation.reason: Liquibase has its own check that checks if the change log location exists making this property redundant.
